title: Junior Investment Banker at Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies in Agra is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies:
Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies!
